title: Quiver's Cleaner Caves
description: Removes stone variants, dirt and gravel veins, glow lichen and closed lava springs in the nether while adding recipes for the removed items.
body:
Removes stone variants, dirt and gravel veins, glow lichen and closed lava springs in the nether.

andesite, granite and diorite can be crafting at a stonecutter for either one stone, cobblestone, deepslate or cobbled deepslate each. Glowlichen can also be crafted by putting a glowberry in a crafting interface.
